mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_number AS orderNumber, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_phone AS customerPhone FROM orders o WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber}

SELECT oi.id AS orderItemId, oi.product_id AS productId, MAX(pov.code) AS productCode, oi.quantity AS quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} AND oi.partner_id = '15f283a9-fd6c-47ba-862d-0af9697a3e1b' GROUP BY oi.id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity ORDER BY oi.created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_tickets WHERE order_item_id = #{orderItemId} AND partner_order_code IS NULL

SELECT ot.partner_order_number AS trno, ( SELECT pov.code FROM order_item_options oio JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id WHERE oio.order_item_id = oi.id LIMIT 1 ) AS productcode FROM order_tickets ot JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = ot.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} AND ot.partner_order_number IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = NOW() WHERE partner_order_number = #{trno} AND ticket_used = false And status = 'ISSUED'
mapper.select: SELECT ot.partner_order_number AS trno, ( SELECT pov.code FROM order_item_options oio JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id WHERE oio.order_item_id = oi.id LIMIT 1 ) AS productcode FROM order_tickets ot JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = ot.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} AND oi.partner_id = '15f283a9-fd6c-47ba-862d-0af9697a3e1b' AND ot.partner_order_number IS NOT NULL -- TRNO 있음 AND ot.partner_order_code IS NOT NULL -- 발급됨 AND ot.ticket_used = false -- 미사용만 And status = 'ISSUED'
